creator: jcarchambeau@gmail.com
text:
This issue manifests itself regardless of drive or hardware.  It's been consistent on both of my HP Microserver G7 N54Ls and my Lenovo Thinkserver TS430 under FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE. 

1. Install FreeBSD.
2. Reboot.

Machine either hands at booting or boots to a boot error.

Workaround;

1. Boot FreeDOS
2. fdisk <drive number> /mbr
3. Reboot.
